_comment: MongoDB Atlas Vector Search index definition for the student_embeddings collection. Create this in Atlas UI: Database > Collections > student_embeddings > Search Indexes > Create Search Index > JSON Editor, with index name matching VECTOR_INDEX in .env (default: student_vector_index). The embedding model Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 produces 384-dimension vectors and the project normalizes them, so cosine similarity is correct.
name: student_vector_index
